title: Reject empty/whitespace pageId in GetPageTool before gateway call
description:
## Evidence
`Agent.Tools/Tools/GetPageTool.ExecuteAsync()` does `var pageId = idEl.GetString() ?? "";` then passes directly to `memory.GetPageAsync(pageId, ...)` with no empty/whitespace check.

## Impact
A malformed tool call returns "Page '' not found" instead of a validation error, making LLM/tool debugging noisier.

## Fix
1. Add `if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(pageId)) return new ToolResult(false, "pageId must be a non-empty string.");`
2. Add tests for `pageId: ""` and `pageId: "   "`

## Verification
Verified against codebase 2026-06-23. See `Data/Pages/audits/msa-audit-verification-6-23.md` section F3.
